subcodes.first_line: This is the Book sent down by the All-Merciful unto all who dwell within the realm of possibility. Exalted is He Who hath spoken and revealed whatsoever He willeth. Verily, He is the All-Powerful, the Almighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن فی الامکان تعالی من نطق و انزل ما اراد انه لهو المقتدر القدیر
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution
